function.name: tap
function.description: Tap on a UI element on the screen. Prefer tapping by content description or text label. Falls back to coordinates if no label is available.

description.description: The accessibility content description or visible text of the element to tap, e.g. 'Search', 'OK', 'Send'

x.description: Screen X coordinate (pixels) to tap. Only use if description is unavailable.

y.description: Screen Y coordinate (pixels) to tap. Only use if description is unavailable.
